summary: Completed subscription gating feature testing. All backend tests pass (17/17). Frontend UI verified - paywall shows for expired users on protected pages, Settings/Billing accessible for all users, Subscribe Now button works correctly.

issues: React console warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (minor React optimization issue)

backend_expired_user_tests: Expired user can access /api/subscription (200, shows is_active=false)
backend_active_user_tests: Active user can access /api/subscription (200, shows is_active=true)
frontend_expired_user_tests: Paywall shown on Minutes page (with 'Your Trial Has Ended' message)
Billing page accessible (shows TRIAL EXPIRED badge)
frontend_active_user_tests: Billing page shows TRIAL - 13 DAYS LEFT badge

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React warning about setState during render in LoginPage (non-blocking, optimization suggestion)
seed_data_creation: Used existing expired user in MongoDB with manually set expired trial
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription gating fully tested. SubscriptionMiddleware in server.py (lines 2704-2784) correctly returns 402 for expired trials on protected routes. Exempt paths include /api/auth/*, /api/subscription/*, /api/categories. Frontend SubscriptionGate component shows paywall with 'Your Trial Has Ended' message and 'Subscribe Now' button linking to /settings/billing. Billing page shows TRIAL EXPIRED badge for expired users and TRIAL - X DAYS LEFT for active users.

backend_middleware.active_users: Active trial users can access all routes

frontend_paywall.component: SubscriptionGate.js wraps protected routes in App.js
frontend_paywall.message: Shows 'Your Trial Has Ended' with feature list

billing_page.expired_state: Shows TRIAL EXPIRED badge and warning message
billing_page.active_state: Shows TRIAL - X DAYS LEFT with days remaining
billing_page.pricing: Monthly $79/month, Annual $790/year with '2 MONTHS FREE' badge
